name: Design Review
about: Request a comprehensive design evaluation for UI/UX improvements
title: '[Design Review] '
labels: 'design-review,needs-evaluation'
assignees: ''
---

## Design Review Request

### Overview
<!-- Briefly describe what needs design review -->

**Component/Page Name**:
**Design Stage**:
- [ ] Wireframe
- [ ] Mockup
- [ ] Prototype
- [ ] Implemented Design
- [ ] Live Page

### Design Assets
<!-- Provide links to design files, screenshots, or live URLs -->

**Design File Link**:
**Screenshot/Video**:
**Live URL** (if applicable):

### Review Focus Areas
<!-- Select the areas you want reviewed -->

**Visual Design**:
- [ ] Color scheme
- [ ] Typography
- [ ] Layout and spacing
- [ ] Visual hierarchy
- [ ] Brand consistency

**User Experience**:
- [ ] User flow
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Call-to-action clarity
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness
- [ ] Interaction design

**Accessibility**:
- [ ] Color contrast (WCAG)
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility
- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] Touch target sizing

### Context
<!-- Help the reviewer understand the design goals -->

**Target Audience**:
**Primary User Goals**:
**Key Metrics/Success Criteria**:
**Design Constraints**:
**Brand Guidelines Reference**:

### Questions for Reviewer
<!-- Specific questions or concerns you have -->

1.
2.
3.

### Previous Feedback (if applicable)
<!-- Reference previous design feedback and changes made -->

**Related Issues/PRs**:
**Changes Made Since Last Review**:

---

## Reviewer Checklist

Use the expert-design-review agent to complete this evaluation:

### Visual Design Analysis
- [ ] Visual hierarchy assessment
- [ ] Color theory evaluation
- [ ] Typography review
- [ ] Layout and spacing analysis
- [ ] Brand alignment check

### User Experience Analysis
- [ ] User flow evaluation
- [ ] Interaction design review
- [ ] Call-to-action effectiveness
- [ ] Navigation clarity
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness check

### Accessibility Assessment
- [ ] WCAG color contrast check (4.5:1 minimum)
- [ ] Alt text and screen reader compatibility
- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] Focus indicators
- [ ] Touch target sizing (48x48px minimum)

### Feedback Generation
- [ ] High priority recommendations
- [ ] Medium priority recommendations
- [ ] Low priority recommendations
- [ ] Design strengths documentation
- [ ] Industry standard references

### Deliverables
- [ ] Completed design review document
- [ ] Priority-based recommendation list
- [ ] Before/after comparison (if applicable)
- [ ] Reference to relevant design standards

---

## Review Template

Copy this template for your review response:

```markdown
## Design Review: [Component/Page Name]

### Overall Assessment
[Professional summary of design strengths and primary concerns]

### Priority Recommendations

#### HIGH PRIORITY
**[Issue]**
- **Problem**: [Clear description]
- **Impact**: [User/business impact]
- **Recommendation**: [Specific solution]
- **Reference**: [Industry standard]

#### MEDIUM PRIORITY
[Same structure]

#### LOW PRIORITY
[Same structure]

### Design Strengths
- [List strengths]

### Accessibility Notes
- [WCAG compliance notes]

### Mobile Considerations
- [Responsive design notes]

### Industry Standards Reference
- [Material Design, Apple HIG, etc.]
```
